name: unifi-network
description: Manage your UniFi network — devices, clients, WiFi SSIDs, VLANs, firewall rules, port forwarding, and guest vouchers.
author: Pzharyuk

env.name: UNIFI_HOST
env.description: Your UniFi controller URL, e.g. https://192.168.1.1

env.name: UNIFI_VERIFY_SSL
env.description: Set to true to enforce SSL certificate validation (default: false)
